---
title: "gruppemde_uge_13"
subtitle: "`gruppemde_uge_13`"
description: "gruppemde_uge_13"
---

<!--
NEVER EDIT MANUALLY. This documentation was auto-generated by `seedcase-flower`.
If you want to edit the content, please make changes to the `datapackage.json` file.
-->

- Path: `resources/gruppemde_uge_13/data.parquet`
- Primary key: (`event`)

| Name                              | Title                           | Type   | Description                                                                                                                                              |
|-----------------------------------|---------------------------------|--------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `event`                           | The unique name of the event    | string | The unique name identifying the event when the form was filled in.                                                                                       |
| `center`                          | Research center                 | string | The research center where the data item was recorded.                                                                                                    |
| `date_group_meeting_13`           | date_group_meeting_13           | date   | Date for group meeting. Group meeting week 13.                                                                                                           |
| `staff_initials_group_meeting_13` | staff_initials_group_meeting_13 | string | Initials of the dietitian responsible for conducting the group meeting. Group meeting week 13.                                                           |
| `attended_group_meeting_13`       | attended_group_meeting_13       | string | Indicates participant's attendance to the group meeting. Group meeting week 13.                                                                          |
| `weight_group_meeting_13`         | weight_group_meeting_13         | number | Participant's weight in kilograms, measured with light clothing using the BMI scale in room 1.15. Measured to the nearest 0.1 kg. Group meeting week 13. |
| `remarks_group_meeting_13`        | remarks_group_meeting_13        | string | Indicates whether there are any special remarks regarding the participant and what they are. Group meeting week 13.                                      |

: Fields in the `gruppemde_uge_13` resource.
